transcript.message: Hello, it's wonderful to connect with you today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter with a growing fintech company. I came across your profile and was impressed with your experience in AI engineering, so I'm excited to learn more about your background. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Pooja Malhotra, nice to connect with you too, Rohan. Currently, I'm working as a Mechanical Engineer at Pied Piper, where I've been focusing on designing and optimizing airflow systems for various industrial applications. My role involves using tools like Excel and Figma to analyze data and create visualizations, which helps me communicate complex ideas to the team.

It sounds like you have a unique blend of technical and creative skills, Pooja. Although your current role is in mechanical engineering, I'm curious to know if you've had any exposure to AI or machine learning concepts, or if there's a particular area within AI that interests you.

I've had some exposure to AI concepts through various projects and training programs, although my primary focus has been on mechanical engineering. I've worked with tools like TensorFlow and Hugging Face Transformers, and I've been interested in exploring their applications in areas like natural language processing and recommendation systems.

It's great to hear that you have some experience with AI concepts, Pooja. Given your interest in areas like natural language processing and recommendation systems, I'm wondering if you've had any experience working with embeddings-based retrieval systems or vector databases, which are key components of our search infrastructure here at the fintech company.

I've had some experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems, specifically with tools like Pinecone and FAISS. I've also worked with Hugging Face Transformers, which has given me a good understanding of how embeddings can be used for tasks like information retrieval and recommendation systems.

It sounds like you have a solid foundation in embeddings-based retrieval systems, Pooja. I'm curious to know, what motivates you to consider a role in fintech, and is there something specific about our company or this Senior AI Engineer position that caught your attention?

I've been looking to expand my skill set and explore new areas, and fintech seems like an exciting space with a lot of opportunities for growth and innovation. Your company's focus on using AI to improve search infrastructure caught my attention, and I'm interested in learning more about how I can contribute to that effort.

It's great to hear that you're interested in exploring new areas and contributing to our company's mission, Pooja. As a Senior AI Engineer here, you'll be working closely with our team to design and implement cutting-edge search infrastructure, which requires a strong understanding of evaluation frameworks for ranking systems. Can you tell me a bit about your experience with metrics like NDCG, MRR, and MAP, and how you've applied them in your previous projects?

I've had some experience with metrics like NDCG, MRR, and MAP, although it's been more on the theoretical side. In my previous projects, I've worked with tools like Redis and Salesforce CRM, which have given me a good understanding of how to design and implement efficient data retrieval systems. I've also been interested in learning more about evaluation frameworks for ranking systems, and I'm excited about the opportunity to apply my knowledge in a real-world setting.

Pooja, it was an absolute pleasure speaking with you today. I'm really impressed with your background and the skills you've shared with me. Your experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems, vector databases, and evaluation frameworks for ranking systems aligns perfectly with the requirements of our Senior AI Engineer role. I'll be in touch with you within the next few days to discuss the next steps in our process. In the meantime, I wish you all the best in your job search and look forward to connecting with you soon. Thank you again for your time today, and I hope you have a great day!

It was great speaking with you too, Rohan. I appreciate the time you took to discuss the role and how my skills align with the position. I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon and learning more about the next steps in the process. Thank you again for your time, and I wish you a great day as well.
